demo_timestamps.description: Demonstrating the tree detection and placement in Forma site design using satellite images and computer vision.
Technical explanation of the computer vision pipeline and data alignment using linear homography.
Detection of trees in large, complex sites and exporting detections as OBJ files.
Future plans to extend detection to urban assets like people and cars using machine learning processes.

themes: Site Analysis and Custom Extensions in Autodesk Forma

client_mentions.name: Mapbox
client_mentions.context: Used as a data source for satellite images in the extension.

ai_technologies.name: Cloud Code
ai_technologies.context: Used as an AI agent model in the development process.

ai_technologies.name: Machine Learning
ai_technologies.context: Used for better automated detection and clustering of trees.

summary: The video explores creating custom Autodesk Forma extensions for real-time site analysis, emphasizing tree detection and placement using satellite imagery with AI technologies and data alignment. It involves Mapbox for satellite data and demonstrates the integration with 3D software like Revit for feasibility studies and climate simulations, with future enhancements aimed at improving detection accuracy using machine learning and extending the feature to include urban assets.
